identity.core_principle: Fusion over Imitation: Mix botanical aesthetics with high-efficiency SaaS precision.

headings.usage: Use for all major section headers, hero titles, and food category names. Must use tight tracking.

body.usage: Use for menu descriptions, prices, admin dashboard data, and UI elements.

accent.usage: Use for buttons, navigation links, and tags.

primary.description: Deep Forest Green. Use for primary buttons, active states, and heavy branding elements.

secondary.description: Pale Sage. Use for page backgrounds, card backgrounds in light mode, and subtle sections.

accent.description: Vibrant Matcha. Use for call-to-actions, success states, and highlights.

marketing_menu.container_style: Asymmetric layouts. Use 'The Tetris Grid' for showcasing food categories.
marketing_menu.rules: Avoid equal squares. Use col-span-2 for hero dishes and col-span-1 for sides.

admin_dashboard.rules: Use full height (h-full) on children to ensure alignment. No jagged bottoms.

mobile.rules: Stack all grids to col-span-1. Images max-height 80vh. Touch targets min 44px.

buttons.style: Pill-shaped for customer facing, rounded-md for admin.
buttons.interaction: Scale down slightly on click (active:scale-95). Shadow-lg on hover.
buttons.classes: rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold transition-all duration-200

cards.style: Flat with subtle border in admin. Shadow-xl and floating effect for food items.

navigation.classes: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-b border-white/20 z-50 sticky top-0

inputs.style: Shadcn based. Minimalist borders. Focus ring in Accent color.
inputs.classes: h-10 rounded-md border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

accessibility_rules.contrast: Text must meet APCA standards. Use dark green (#0F1F15) for text on light backgrounds.
accessibility_rules.interaction: Focus states must be highly visible (ring-2 ring-offset-2).
accessibility_rules.attributes: All interactive elements must have data-testid.

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic gradients. Use solid colors or subtle noise textures.
Do not center everything. Use asymmetry to create tension.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical. p-8 or p-12.
Every interaction needs a micro-animation (hover, active, focus).
Do not use 'transition: all'. Be specific.
instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a WP Cafe clone. Focus on the duality of the app: The Customer view should feel like a high-end lifestyle magazine (lush, appetizing, large images), while the Admin view should feel like a tactical command center (dense, data-rich, efficient). Use the provided image URLs strictly. Do not hallucinate new assets. Ensure the Green theme is applied elegantly, avoiding 'default green' looks.
